info.title: PinePods API
info.description: HTTP API for the PinePods podcast server. Most endpoints require an `Api-Key` header tied to a user account; admin-only endpoints additionally require an admin (or web) key. This reference is generated directly from the backend source, so it stays in sync with the running code.

servers.description: This PinePods server (same origin as the API)

302.description: Redirect back to the application after OIDC login

post.summary: Confirm or deny a detected ad segment (per-user)

get.summary: List models installed in the AI sidecar (admin)

post.summary: Pull a model into the AI sidecar (admin)

get.summary: Whether the optional AI sidecar is available

post.summary: Add multiple episodes to a collection

get.summary: List the distinct podcast categories across a user's subscriptions

403.description: Cannot create a collection for another user

409.description: A collection with that name already exists
A collection with that name already exists

post.summary: Add an episode to a collection
Remove an episode from a collection

403.description: Cannot create a playlist for another user

post.summary: Detect ads for an episode (AI sidecar)
Run silence detection for an episode

get.summary: Get auto-skip segments for an episode
Get the stored (generated) transcript for an episode
Get podcast id from ep id
Get podcast id from ep name

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: API key (alternative to the Api-Key header)

401.description: API key is required or invalid

parameters.name: source
parameters.description:
Which collection to build the feed from. Absent = all subscriptions (default).
One of: saved, queue, playlist, collection, downloads, history.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Playlist or collection id (required when `source` is `playlist` or `collection`).

get.summary:
Health check endpoint with database and Redis status
GET /api/health

PinePods instance check endpoint - matches Python API exactly
GET /api/pinepods_check

200.description: Confirms this is a PinePods instance

403.description: API key does not belong to the requested user
API key does not belong to the requested user
Task does not belong to the requesting user

AiSettingsUpdate.description:
Update payload from the settings page. `llm_api_key` is only written when `Some(non-empty)`,
so leaving the field blank preserves the stored key; `clear_api_key` removes it.

auto_add_categories.description: Podcast categories whose episodes are auto-added to this collection (None = disabled).
Podcast categories to auto-add episodes from (None/empty = disabled).

backfill.description: When true, immediately backfill existing matching episodes after saving.

auto_add_categories.description: Podcast categories to auto-add episodes from (empty vec clears the rule).

backfill.description: When true, immediately backfill existing matching episodes after saving.

tags.name: podcasts
tags.description: Podcast subscriptions, episodes, queue, and playback

tags.name: episodes
tags.description: Episode actions: download, save, share, bulk ops
